_README: This file is the COLUMN MAP for MDC_Repo_List_Analysis*.xlsx. It is the knob the
intranet Codex edits when the sheet changes — you should almost never need to touch
How matching works: a semantic field lists the header text(s) it accepts under
'aliases'. Matching ignores case, spaces and punctuation, so 'MDC Common', 'mdc_common'
and 'MDC  COMMON' all match — but a genuine RENAME (e.g. the column becomes 'Shared?')
means you add that new text to the aliases list here. Nothing else changes.
To add a NEW channel column: add "<Header Text>": "<canonical-channel>" to channel_flags.
To add a NEW yes/no flag you don't care to name: do nothing — any Y/N column is captured
automatically into each repo's 'flags' map. Only name it here if downstream logic needs it.
If a field's column is missing, that field is simply left empty (never a crash).
When you override a block, provide the WHOLE block (blocks replace, they don't merge).
